68b8fc8a3c4c0515ae31d854.question: Janibeg occupied the Genoese colony of Caffa in this region. A khanate based in this region was abolished in the Treaty of Kucuk Kaynarca [koo-CHOOK kay-NARK-a], whilethis region’s Tatar population was expelled by Joseph Stalin. Greek settlers founded the city of (*) Kerch on this peninsula, on which the battle of Balaclava occurred. Sevastopol is the chief port of, for ten points, what Ukrainian peninsula bordering the Sea of Azov and currently occupied by Russia?
68b8fc8a3c4c0515ae31d854.question_sanitized: Janibeg occupied the Genoese colony of Caffa in this region. A khanate based in this region was abolished in the Treaty of Kucuk Kaynarca [koo-CHOOK kay-NARK-a], whilethis region's Tatar population was expelled by Joseph Stalin. Greek settlers founded the city of (*) Kerch on this peninsula, on which the battle of Balaclava occurred. Sevastopol is the chief port of, for ten points, what Ukrainian peninsula bordering the Sea of Azov and currently occupied by Russia?

68b8fc8a3c4c0515ae31d8c8.leadin: Sejong the Great stated that a wise man could learn this alphabet in a morning, while stupid men could learn this alphabet in the span of ten days. For ten points each:
68b8fc8a3c4c0515ae31d8c8.leadin_sanitized: Sejong the Great stated that a wise man could learn this alphabet in a morning, while stupid men could learn this alphabet in the span of ten days. For ten points each:
parts: Name this alphabet used by the Butonese people to transliterate their native language, Cia-Cia [chyaa chyaa]. This alphabet is primarily used to transliterate Korean.
In Korea, Hangul replaced the Hanja writing system, which used characters from this language which was simplified by Mao Zedong’s regime during the Cultural Revolution.
The Butonese people are indigenous to this Indonesian island alongside the Torajan people, who inhabit its South Peninsula. The Strait of Makassar separates this island from Kalimantan.
parts_sanitized: Name this alphabet used by the Butonese people to transliterate their native language, Cia-Cia [chyaa chyaa]. This alphabet is primarily used to transliterate Korean.
In Korea, Hangul replaced the Hanja writing system, which used characters from this language which was simplified by Mao Zedong's regime during the Cultural Revolution.
The Butonese people are indigenous to this Indonesian island alongside the Torajan people, who inhabit its South Peninsula. The Strait of Makassar separates this island from Kalimantan.
